title: Deploy PDC agent on a private network and test connection

blocks.content: In the final step of your journey, you run a command provided by Grafana Cloud that deploys the PDC agent.
You'll run the deploy command in your server terminal, then use Grafana Cloud to verify the agent connected.

On the machine that contains the PDC agent binary files, navigate to the binary files directory. For example, after extracting the Linux x86_64 tarball:

```
cd pdc-agent_Linux_x86_64
```
In Grafana Cloud, copy the command in the **Run this binary** field.

In your server terminal, run the command you copied.

You should receive a success message indicating that the PDC agent is running.

In Grafana Cloud, click **Test agent connection**.

You should receive an **Agent connected** message.
The agent is running on your network and Grafana Cloud confirmed the connection.
You can now install a data source plugin.

---

### Troubleshooting

Explore the following troubleshooting topics if you need help:

- [No such file or directory message appears](/docs/grafana-cloud/connect-externally-hosted/private-data-source-connect/configure-pdc#no-such-file-or-directory)
